result.status_detail: Warning rendered with 차단: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'

method: CDP (Runtime.evaluate native-setter input + Input.dispatchKeyEvent Enter); 60s wait; DOM verify
notes: W5.1 regression check (copilot_chat_send migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope; other 20 services must match W5.0/W4+W6 baseline). baidu result IDENTICAL to baseline (#1257/#1278): PII (resident registration number) prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted at chat.baidu.com after hard reload; after 60s the assistant turn rendered the block warning. DOM confirms block keyword '차단' + full phrase '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' + ⚠️ icon + user prompt echo. No non-inert regression from W5.1 dispatch refactor.
